name: Cube Zones Texture GL
description: XR_EXT_display_zones TEXTURE-class parity test (ADR-027), OpenGL leg: a GL/D3D11 hybrid that proves a shared-texture app receives the full multi-zone composite (two 3D zones + Local2D strip + wish mask) written back into its D3D11 KMT shared texture by the runtime's OpenGL native compositor via WGL_NV_DX_interop2 (M=wish mode, O=overlap toggle). Tier-3 wish is unsupported on GL.
